name: 3DX Industries, Inc.
business: 3DX Industries manufactures consumer and corporate products using additive manufacturing through 3D Metal printing technology and conventional precision manufacturing processes. The company serves product developers worldwide who require custom parts for prototyping, functional testing, market evaluation, or production. The company also offers precision machining services including CNC milling, large capacity milling, and injection mold tooling from its facility in Ferndale, Washington.

exposures.sentence: The Company manufactures consumer and corporate products using an additive manufacturing method through 3D Metal printing technology and conventional precision manufacturing processes.

This is a massive market covering a range of industries from aviation, automotive, military and medical to consumer products, such as Jewelry and Fashion, as well as technology proto-type products and equipment.

catalysts.event: Renewed lease for manufacturing facility for five-year term
catalysts.sentence: On February 29, 2016, the Company extended a lease agreement originally entered into in January 2014 for a term of five years expiring February 28, 2021.

tamClaims.claim: The 3D printing market is expected to witness growing demand through 2020.
tamClaims.sentence: As reported by Grand View Research, 'some key industry participants include Stratasys Inc., 3D Systems Corporation, Envisiontec GmbH, and Materialise NV. Intensifying competition is expected to result in lowered prices and increased shipments in the 3D printing market in the coming years. With products maturing rapidly, and iteratively enhancing technology reducing the gap between objects made using this form of printing and conventional methods, the market is expected to witness growing demand' through 2020.
